summary: Phase 4 Refactoring testing complete. All 10 invoice endpoints extracted to /app/backend/routers/invoices.py work correctly. 26/26 backend tests passed. Route collision fix verified (/invoices/stats not intercepted by /invoices/{id}). Frontend BonsTab and Factures components render correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ CRITICAL: Route collision test - /api/invoices/stats NOT intercepted by /api/invoices/{id}
✅ CRITICAL: Route collision test - /api/invoices/stats/monthly works correctly
✅ POST /api/invoices creates invoice with EM-YYYYMMDD-XXXX format
✅ GET /api/invoices with role=server returns validated + own pending
✅ GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf generates PDF with application/pdf content-type
✅ Frontend: Factures sub-tab visible and clickable
✅ Frontend: MANAGER GENERAL sub-tab visible and clickable
✅ Frontend: MANAGER GENERAL shows orders with Facture/Imprimer/Réglé buttons
critical_code_review_comments: invoices.py correctly extracted with 568 lines, 10 endpoints
server.py reduced from 6889 to 6340 lines (-549 lines)
Router inclusion order correct: reports_router before invoices_router ensures /invoices/stats takes precedence
Invoice models (InvoiceItemCreate, InvoiceCreate, Invoice) moved to routers/invoices.py
Stock sync logic on validation preserved (recipe-based and direct name match)
Table auto-stop on validation preserved with service_stats recording
PDF generation with reportlab working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up 5 test invoices (TEST_* prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 refactoring (invoices router extraction) successful. All 10 invoice endpoints work correctly. Route collision fix verified. No bugs found. server.py now at 6340 lines.

refactoring_verification.route_collision_fix: reports_router included BEFORE invoices_router at line 86-87 in server.py
refactoring_verification.stock_sync_verified: PUT /api/invoices/{id} with validation_status=validated triggers stock deduction via recipe or direct name match
refactoring_verification.pdf_generation_verified: GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf returns application/pdf with correct filename header
